reviews.comment:
llegas, cargas y seguis. buena atencion. casi siempre me preguntaron " agua aceite? le repaso los vidrios? tiene debito y credito. no tienen cuenta DNI. Se puede decir que es pequeña, pero no vamos a pasear a la estacion, se carga y se sigue. si hay cola obviamente se tarda como en todas las estaciones, no se puede apurar el surtidor. Mas alla de ellos estoy escuchando cada vez mas sobre la poca calidad o disminucion del octanage de la nafta de YPF.
Destaco que es la unica estacion  en la zona de lujan-Rodriguez que tiene el inflador aun sin cargo. Eso lo re valoro, espero que lo sostengan por mucho tiempo mas y que la gente lo cuide. bien, paso con frecuencia.

(Translated by Google)
You arrive, fill up, and keep going. Good service. They almost always ask me, "Water or oil? Do you want me to clean the windows?" They accept debit and credit cards. They don't have a DNI account. You could say it's small, but we don't go to the station for leisure; we fill up and keep going. If there's a line, obviously it takes a while, like at any station; you can't rush the pump. Beyond that, I'm hearing more and more about the poor quality or decrease in the octane rating of YPF gasoline. I want to highlight that it's the only station in the Luján-Rodríguez area that still has the tire inflator free of charge. I really appreciate that; I hope they keep it for a long time and that people take care of it. I'm a frequent visitor.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtaV9hQ2FREAE
